vocab.meaning: điểm nhấn/phần rực rỡ nhất của chuyến đi
vocab.example: Reaching the summit at dawn was undoubtedly the climax of the journey, offering a view like no other.

vocab.meaning: làn nước trong vắt như pha lê
vocab.example: The island is renowned for its crystalline waters, where you can see the seabed even at great depths.

vocab.meaning: đô thị rộng lớn (phát triển mạnh về diện tích)
vocab.example: From the observation deck, the sprawling metropolis looked like a giant circuit board glowing in the dark.
Hidden behind the dunes was a tranquil oasis, a sight that felt almost like a mirage after hours of trekking.

vocab.meaning: những đỉnh núi hùng vĩ/uy nghi
vocab.example: The imposing peaks of the Alps dominated the horizon, sheer and magnificent against the blue sky.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh ngập tràn ánh nắng
vocab.example: We drove through a sun-drenched landscape of vineyards and olive groves in southern France.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn/cảnh tượng say đắm lòng người
vocab.example: As the fog cleared, it revealed a captivating vista of the ancient ruins nestled in the valley.
The contrast between the white sand and the vast azure sky was simply breathtaking.
The fjords of Norway offer some of the most majestic scenery I have ever had the privilege to witness.

vocab.meaning: khung cảnh bình dị, thơ mộng
vocab.example: The village was located in an idyllic setting, surrounded by rolling hills and babbling brooks.
